name: bootstrap
description: Bootstraps a new machine to Pedro's Claude Code setup. Two layers: (1) auto-syncs third-party marketplaces & plugins via hooks (manifest-driven convergence), and (2) applies the versioned global config — env vars, permissions, behavior flags, the global CLAUDE.md, and a machine-resolved statusLine. Replaces bootstrap-third-party. Run /bootstrap:setup once per new machine.
